task_completion.description: Create an IFC project in Bonsai (BlenderBIM) with 'Greenfield' in the project name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the BlenderBIM Project Setup panel or the Outliner. The root IFC project node should be visible and named 'Greenfield Innovation Hub' or contain 'Greenfield'.

task_completion.description: Include at least one IfcCurtainWall entity in the model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Outliner or Object Properties tab. There should be an object explicitly classed or named as an IfcCurtainWall.

task_completion.description: Include at least three IfcMember entities (representing mullions/transoms).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Outliner. There should be at least three distinct objects classed as IfcMember. They should also be visible as frame-like geometry in the 3D viewport.

task_completion.description: Include at least two IfcPlate entities (representing glazing panels).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Outliner. There should be at least two distinct objects classed as IfcPlate. They should be visible as flat panel geometry in the 3D viewport.

task_completion.description: Assign a material containing 'Glass' or 'Glazing' in its name to at least one element.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Material Properties tab or BlenderBIM material assignment panels. A material named 'Glass' or 'Glazing' (or containing those words) should be created and assigned to one of the objects (likely an IfcPlate).
Look for a 'Save As' dialog, a file manager window, or a terminal confirming the file 'facade_curtainwall.ifc' has been saved in the '/home/ga/BIMProjects/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Blender/Bonsai GUI to create the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Blender interface with the Bonsai/BlenderBIM add-on active, rather than a terminal window writing an IFC file via python script or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent created actual 3D geometry for the facade elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport should display visible 3D meshes for the mullions (IfcMember) and panels (IfcPlate), not just empty objects or null nodes in the outliner.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply open an existing IFC file in a text editor to manually type in the required entities.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of text editors (like nano, vim, or gedit) open with raw STEP/IFC code. All modifications should happen within the Blender environment.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Project Name: 'Greenfield Innovation Hub'. Minimum required entities: 1 IfcCurtainWall, 3 IfcMembers, 2 IfcPlates. Required material name must contain 'Glass' or 'Glazing'. Expected save path: '/home/ga/BIMProjects/facade_curtainwall.ifc'.
